text: A person who has had his or her escort certificate cancelled shall not be eligible to reapply for an escort certificate for a minimum period of six months from the date of such cancellation.
markdown:
# Vehicle & Traffic Law
## Title 5
#### Article 21
##### § 550 — Recertification

A person who has had his or her escort certificate cancelled shall not be eligible to reapply for an escort certificate for a minimum period of six months from the date of such cancellation.

*Last modified: Sep. 22, 2014*
